---
title: "Pictorial History of the World’s Great Nations, from the Earliest Dates to the Present Time, A. 2 vols"
---

## Pictorial History of the World’s Great Nations, from the Earliest Dates to the Present Time, A. 2 vols

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** New York: Selmar Hess.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
